text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of our clash against Narita Taishin at the
spring Tenno Sho has arrived.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The switch in venue from the Kyoto Racecourse
to the Hanshin Racecourse has necessitated some
adjustments to the winning equation, but Biwa
Hayahide isn't worried.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her fighting spirit burns brightly within her as she
aims for first place.
